name: Pharmaceutical Manufacturing Sabotage
description: Attack tree modelling compromise of pharmaceutical manufacturing systems to sabotage drug production by altering batch control recipes, quality testing, or environmental controls
root_objective: Sabotage pharmaceutical drug production through cyber-physical attack

nodes.title: Sabotage Pharmaceutical Manufacturing
nodes.description: Compromise pharma manufacturing systems to alter drug formulations, contaminate batches, or disrupt production of critical medications

nodes.title: Compromise Batch Control System
nodes.description: Access the ISA-88 batch control system managing drug production recipes

nodes.title: Modify Batch Recipe Parameters
nodes.description: Alter active ingredient quantities, mixing times, or temperature profiles in the batch recipe

nodes.title: Compromise DCS Engineering Workstation
nodes.description: Access the DCS (Distributed Control System) engineering workstation used for recipe management

nodes.title: Tamper with Quality Control Systems
nodes.description: Compromise QC/QA laboratory systems to mask defective or adulterated products

nodes.title: Modify LIMS Test Results
nodes.description: Alter Laboratory Information Management System (LIMS) results to show pass for failing batches

nodes.title: Compromise Spectroscopy/HPLC Instruments
nodes.description: Tamper with analytical instruments to return false assay results for contaminated products

nodes.title: Attack Environmental Controls
nodes.description: Compromise cleanroom and environmental monitoring to introduce contamination

nodes.title: Alter Cleanroom HVAC Parameters
nodes.description: Modify air handling settings (pressure differentials, HEPA filtration) in manufacturing cleanrooms

nodes.title: Spoof Environmental Monitoring Sensors
nodes.description: Feed false temperature, humidity, or particle count data to EMS while conditions are out of spec

nodes.title: Disrupt Cold Chain and Logistics
nodes.description: Compromise cold chain monitoring for temperature-sensitive biologics

nodes.title: Manipulate Cold Storage Temperature
nodes.description: Alter cold storage setpoints or monitoring to spoil vaccine/biologic stock without detection

nodes.title: Falsify Chain of Custody Records
nodes.description: Modify electronic batch records and chain of custody to obscure when products were compromised
